special_mechanics.name: Health Depletion
special_mechanics.description: Player starts with 11 health points that gradually depletes over time. Maximum health is 16 points. Health can be replenished by collecting fruit or milk bottles. Reaching zero health results in loss of life.

special_mechanics.name: Invincibility Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Honey Girl fairy grants invincibility for approximately 10 seconds, allowing player to kill enemies on touch

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Player starts without attack capability. Stone axe can be found and picked up to gain attacking ability. Axe can be traded for magical fireballs with longer range that can destroy rocks and rolling stones.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data from Wikipedia gameplay description. No precise physics parameters documented in source material. Game is adaptation of arcade Wonder Boy with Hudson Soft modifications.
